name: Salvage Marines
overview: When Samuel, a factory laborer on planet Baen 6, learns his wife is pregnant, he does the only thing he can to ensure his child will avoid the same societal debt he has - he enlists in the planet's military ranks as a salvage marine.

trailers.title: Salvage Marines | Official Trailer | 2022 | SciFi, Action, Casper Van Dien
